channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Imperfection itself becomes an asset' — Scientists find brilliant way to use messy quantum noise and build a silicon photonic chip that embraces the chaos
item.description: Researchers develop a silicon photonic chip that controls quantum noise using deliberate photon loss channels to study real system behaviour experimentally.

item.title: Ansel Adams' trust says AI-colorized version of his work was exhibited without permission
item.description: The AI-generated version of 'Moonrise, Hernandez, New Mexico' was on display at AIPAD's The Photography show.

item.title: The RAM apocalypse doesn’t mean you can’t upgrade your PC setup, as these Memorial Day accessory deals prove
item.description: Beat the RAM crisis by upgrading the rest of your PC setup with these Memorial Day deals, featuring cheap keyboards, Wi-Fi boosters, and monitors.

item.title: SolarSquare in talks to raise up to $60M as India’s rooftop solar market draws major VC interest
item.description: SolarSquare could be valued at up to $500 million in the financing expected to close next month.
